errors.loadFailed: We couldn't load your dream board.
errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save your latest changes.

firstImage.title: Start your Dream Board with a first image
firstImage.description: Add one image to unlock Quick Vision, category insights, and your full visual board experience.

features.quickVision: Quick Vision keeps your dreams and progress visible at a glance.
features.categories: Category cards reveal how each area of your future is taking shape.
features.insights: Insights help you spot balance, momentum, and next steps across your dreams.

quickVision.title: Quick Vision
quickVision.errorLoading: Unable to load quick vision data: {{error}}

expandedContent.emptyState: No dreams in this category yet.

keyTakeaways.title: Key takeaways
keyTakeaways.emptyMessage: Add more dream activity to unlock richer insights.

modal.title: Insight details
modal.visualizationPlaceholder: A deeper visualization for this insight will appear here.

emptyState.text: Your universe is empty for now.
emptyState.subtext: Add dreams to see them connect as a living constellation.

challenge.title: Dream Challenge
challenge.noActiveChallenges: No active challenges yet. Create one to turn a dream into a daily practice.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the habit or outcome this challenge supports

tips.daily: Daily challenges work best when the action is simple and repeatable.
tips.weekly: Weekly challenges give you more room for deeper focus and recovery.
tips.custom: Choose a custom rhythm when your routine needs flexibility.

timeline.title: Timeline view
timeline.noDates: Add dates to your milestones to unlock the timeline view.

chart.title: Progress chart
chart.noMilestones: There isn't enough milestone data to plot progress yet.

firstStep.title: First Step
firstStep.description: Complete your first milestone to start building momentum.

wellPlanned.title: Well Planned
wellPlanned.description: Give every milestone a target date.

dreamAchieved.title: Dream Achieved
dreamAchieved.description: Complete every milestone and finish the dream.

list.title: Milestone list
list.emptyState: No milestones yet. Add one to start tracking progress.

board.title: Dream Board
board.defaultDescription: Vision board created with my dreams and goals
board.failedToSave: We couldn't save your Dream Board.
board.errorSaving: An error occurred while saving your Dream Board.
board.imageLimit: You've reached the image limit for this Dream Board.
board.imageUnsupportedType: This file type isn't supported. Use JPG, PNG, or WebP.
board.imageUploadLimit: This image exceeds the {{limit}} upload limit.

introScreen.title: Welcome to your Dream Board
introScreen.description: Turn your goals into a living visual space you can shape, track, and revisit anytime.

addContent.title: Add content
addContent.description: Upload images that represent the life and goals you want to build.

trackGoals.title: Track goals
trackGoals.description: Attach milestones so progress feels concrete and measurable.

customize.title: Customize
customize.description: Arrange and refine your board until it feels motivating and clear.

saveShare.title: Save and revisit
saveShare.description: Keep your board evolving as your dreams gain momentum.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.description: Break this dream into steps you can actually complete.

deleteConfirmation.title: Delete content?
deleteConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to delete this {{type}}?

contentControls.noStylingOptions: No style controls are available for this content yet.

messages.briefcase: Career dreams grow when your daily effort points in the same direction.
messages.money: Financial freedom is built through steady, intentional progress.
messages.health: Your wellbeing supports every other dream on this board.
messages.house: A stable home begins with the choices you make today.
messages.growth: Personal growth compounds when you keep showing up.
messages.heart: Meaningful relationships deepen when you invest in them.
messages.recreation: Joy and play deserve room in the future you're building.
messages.meditation: Inner calm gives your goals more clarity and resilience.
messages.graduation: Learning unlocks the next version of your life.
messages.travel: Adventure gets closer every time you make one concrete plan.
messages.default: Every symbol on your board represents a future worth shaping.

timelineGallery.title: Timeline Gallery
timelineGallery.subtitle: Capture the images, milestones, and momentum behind each dream.
timelineGallery.emptyHint: Add your first image to start building a visual timeline for this dream board.
timelineGallery.scrollHint: Use the arrows or keyboard to explore your timeline
timelineGallery.removeImageConfirm: Remove {{title}} from your dream board timeline?

form.dreamTitlePlaceholder: Name the dream this image represents
form.milestonesEmpty: No milestones yet. Add one if you want to track a future step.

errors.submitFailed: We could not upload this image right now. Try again.

wizard.title: Add a dream image
wizard.subtitle: Complete each step to place a new image on your Dream Board timeline.

file.title: Choose a file
file.description: Select a JPG, PNG, or WebP image up to {{limit}}.

details.title: Add details
details.description: Give the image a title or caption so the moment is easy to recognize later.

category.title: Pick a category
category.description: Place the image under the dream area it supports the most.

milestones.title: Plan milestones
milestones.description: Add optional milestones to connect this image to concrete progress.

dropzone.title: Drop an image here
dropzone.hint: Drag and drop a file, or browse your device.

fields.caption: Caption
fields.captionPlaceholder: Add context, inspiration, or a note about why this image matters

fileLimit.title: Image requirements
fileLimit.default: Choose a file up to {{limit}}. JPG, PNG, and WebP are supported.
fileLimit.validating: {{name}} is being checked. Original size: {{originalSize}}. Limit: {{limit}}.
fileLimit.ready: {{name}} is ready to upload. Original size: {{originalSize}}. Limit: {{limit}}.
fileLimit.tooLarge: {{name}} is too large at {{originalSize}}. Choose an image under {{limit}}.
fileLimit.unsupportedType: {{name}} is not a supported format. Use JPG, PNG, or WebP under {{limit}}.
fileLimit.failed: We could not validate {{name}}. Original size: {{originalSize}}. Try another image under {{limit}}.

validation.fileRequired: Select an image before moving to the next step.
validation.validatingFile: Checking your file against the {{limit}} limit...
validation.fileReady: Your file is ready. You can continue to the next step.
validation.fileTooLarge: This image is too large. Choose a file under {{limit}}.
validation.unsupportedType: This file type is not supported. Use JPG, PNG, or WebP.
validation.fileValidationFailed: We could not validate this file. Try another image.
validation.detailsRequired: Add at least a title or caption before continuing.

uploading.title: Uploading your image
uploading.subtitle: Hold on while we add it to your Dream Board timeline.

completed.title: Image added
completed.subtitle: Your dream image is now part of the timeline.
